rulings.Case Title: GEORGE PATTERSON et al VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIALS CO. et al
rulings.Rulings: Line 2. Defendant Cahill Construction Services, Inc.¿s MSJ is denied. Defendant failed to sustain its initial burden under either prong of Aguilar. Defendant failed to sustain its burden of demonstrating that plaintiffs do not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that Mr. Patterson was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials attributable to defendant. By failing to attach plaintiffs¿ verifications to defendant¿s contention discovery with its moving papers, defendant is precluded from successfully invoking the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. Where a verification is required, an unverified response is equivalent to no response at all. (Appleton v. Sup. Ct. (1988) 206 Cal.App.3d 632, 636.) Defendant did not satisfy its burden of negating an essential element of plaintiffs¿ claims against defendant. Even if admissible, the Articles of Incorporation do not demonstrate that defendant did not work at any site where Mr. Patterson worked. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 10:00am. A reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one reporter. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to B&P Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost. Any party who contests a tentative must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. If a tentative is contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative and must bring it to the hearing. If a tentative is not contested, prepare a proposed order and must either bring it to the hearing or submit after the hearing in compliance w/ CRC3.1312.
